vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: SQL Injection in IIoT gateway API
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SQL injection in EdgeSentry gateway API allowing unauthenticated RCE on OT network
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch, segment OT network, or discontinue use in critical infrastructure
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub for appsec-lab — Crestline Systems. CWE-89 in IIoT context is ransomware vector.

vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Hardcoded credentials in EdgeSentry gateway management interface
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Rotate credentials and implement credential management
